title: Fix AI chat UIs for screen readers
meta_description: Fix WCAG violations in AI chat UIs with 3 silent failures: live region announcements, focus traps, and Safari containment bugs. Reduce support tickets by 12% with these fixes.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams ship AI chat interfaces that break screen readers.

VoiceOver drops replies.
Focus jumps away after sending.
Safari crashes the live region.

https://kubaik.github.io/fix-ai-chat-uis-for-screen-readers

#Web3 #AI #AiChatAccessibility #WcagChatInterface
